chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D982 of 2014: Abdul Waheed Kori Memon & others vs. The Secretary, Culture and Tourism Department, G.O.P &others. For the Petitioners: Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Muhammad Imran Abbasi, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Dates of hearing: 09.03.2022 Date of announcement: 09.03.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J.The petitioners seek release of salaries in respect of their contractual appointment, of three months and six months respectively with effect from 2012/13, which have admittedly never been renewed. The recovery of contractual dues, if any, is not amenable for adjudication before the writ jurisdiction of this Court and the petitioners remained at liberty to institute appropriate proceedings before the Court of competent plenary jurisdiction. This petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
